scripts.dev: bun run --filter './packages/core' build && bun run --env-file=.env --filter './apps/api' dev
scripts.lint: bun run lint:js && bun run lint:rust
scripts.format: bun run format:js && bun run format:rust
scripts.format:check: bun run format:check:js && bun run format:check:rust
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:js && bun run typecheck:rust
scripts.typecheck:js: bun run --filter './apps/api' typecheck && bun run --filter './apps/web' typecheck && bun run --filter './packages/shared' typecheck
scripts.test: LUCENTDOCS_TEST_MODE=1 LUCENTDOCS_TEST_DATA_DIR=${LUCENTDOCS_TEST_DATA_DIR:-data-test} bun run --filter './apps/api' --filter './packages/shared' test && LUCENTDOCS_TEST_MODE=1 LUCENTDOCS_TEST_DATA_DIR=${LUCENTDOCS_TEST_DATA_DIR:-data-test} bun run --cwd apps/web test && cargo test -p core
